message:
style(fsfs): reformat TUI runtime for idiomatic Rust style and modernize key matching

Reformat crates/frankensearch-fsfs/src/runtime.rs for improved readability
and idiomatic Rust patterns:

Key Matching Modernization:
- Replace verbose KeyCode::Char('q') | KeyCode::Char('Q') patterns with
  compact KeyCode::Char('q' | 'Q') or-pattern syntax throughout
- Replace KeyCode::Esc with KeyCode::Escape for consistency with the
  crossterm/ftui key code enum naming
- Apply the same pattern to KeyCode::Char('r' | 'R') for refresh bindings

Formatting Improvements:
- Break long chained method calls (.saturating_add(1).min(...)) across
  multiple lines for readability in the Up/Down/j/k key handlers
- Reformat centered_rect function signature to place each parameter on
  its own line instead of a single long line
- Break long format!() macro invocations in render_root_selector_frame
  and render_existing_index_dashboard_frame across multiple lines
- Reformat if-let chain in poll_event handling for line length compliance
- Break proposals.get(selected).map(...) return across lines

Lint Suppression:
- Add #[allow(clippy::too_many_lines)] to render_root_selector_frame to
  acknowledge the function's inherent complexity without forcing an
  artificial split

No behavioral changes. All reformatting preserves exact runtime semantics.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
